'''ngavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zingingly|zingingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zingingly|zingingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngavate|ngavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngavatesher|ngavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavatesherĂ«m|ngavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngavatero|ngavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngavateshĂ«|ngavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavateshĂ«m|ngavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingavatero|gokingavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingavateshĂ«|gokingavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingavateshĂ«m|gokingavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongavankerom|gongavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongavankeshĂ«|gongavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongavankeshĂ«m|gongavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongavankeya|gongavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngavaterom|ngavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavatemu|ngavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngavateya|ngavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingavaterom|gokingavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingavatemu|gokingavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingavateya|gokingavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngavavate|ngavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngavavatesher|ngavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavavatesherĂ«m|ngavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngavavatero|ngavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngavavateshĂ«|ngavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavavateshĂ«m|ngavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingavavatero|gokingavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingavavateshĂ«|gokingavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingavavateshĂ«m|gokingavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongavavankerom|gongavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongavavankeshĂ«|gongavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongavavankeshĂ«m|gongavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongavavankeya|gongavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngavavaterom|ngavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavavatemu|ngavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngavavateya|ngavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingavavaterom|gokingavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingavavatemu|gokingavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingavavateya|gokingavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠvĂŠte|ngĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠvĂŠtesher|ngĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠvĂŠtero|ngĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠvĂŠtero|gokingĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠvĂŠterom|ngĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠvĂŠtemu|ngĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠvĂŠteya|ngĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠvĂŠterom|gokingĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠvĂŠteya|gokingĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafvafte|ngafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafvaftesher|ngafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafvaftesherĂ«m|ngafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafvaftero|ngafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafvafteshĂ«|ngafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafvafteshĂ«m|ngafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafvaftero|gokingafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafvafteshĂ«|gokingafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafvafteshĂ«m|gokingafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafvafnkerom|gongafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafvafnkeshĂ«|gongafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafvafnkeshĂ«m|gongafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafvafnkeya|gongafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafvafterom|ngafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafvaftemu|ngafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafvafteya|ngafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafvafterom|gokingafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafvaftemu|gokingafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafvafteya|gokingafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
